title: Oracle's TikTok stake sits at just over $2 billion, filing shows
summary_full: Oracle bought 15% of TikTok's U.S. operations in January after China's ByteDance was forced by U.S. law to divest.
summary_public: Oracle bought 15% of TikTok's U.S. operations in January after China's ByteDance was forced by U.S. law to divest.
